text.title: gateway-fallback-chain Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gateway-fallback-chain as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Fallback chain with the same model from three different routers (e.g., direct, OpenRouter, AWS Bedrock).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Same model means same content-policy refusal and same outage class; you pay three integrations for one logical fallback.

failure-mode.description: Routing every call through the gateway "for consistency" while paying for prompt-caching workloads.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Loses the cache discount on the workloads that benefit from it the most; the gateway saving is dwarfed by the cache loss.
